name: obsidian-codex-plugin
description: Codex-native Obsidian wiki workflows for dropping loose notes into an inbox, then organizing them into durable knowledge over time.

interface.shortDescription: Turn loose Obsidian notes into a self-organizing wiki.
interface.longDescription: A clean-room Codex-native Obsidian wiki plugin that scaffolds an inbox-first vault, lets users drop loose Markdown notes into wiki/00.inbox, and helps organize them into sources, literature notes, permanent notes, indexes, cited retrieval, lint reports, saved sessions, research plans, canvases, and methodology modes using filesystem-first helpers with optional transport detection.
defaultPrompt: Set up an Obsidian wiki vault.
Organize the loose notes in my wiki inbox.
Ingest this source into my wiki.
Save this conversation to my wiki.
